title: BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI) Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: Stock Analysis aggregates analyst forecasts and price targets for BigBear.ai Holdings (BBAI). Two analysts cover the stock with a consensus rating of Buy and average price target of $5.50, representing 29% upside from recent levels. Individual analyst targets range from $5.00 to $6.00. The forecast reflects relatively narrow consensus despite significant uncertainty around execution and profitability timing. Earnings forecasts show expectations for continued losses through at least 2026, with potential path to profitability in 2027-2028 dependent on revenue acceleration and margin improvement. Revenue projections for 2026 average $145 million, with 2027 expectations of $155-170 million, implying moderate growth. Key assumptions in the forecast models include: successful backlog conversion, Ask Sage integration and revenue contribution, additional contract awards from the $900 million Air Force vehicle, and margin maintenance at 30%+ levels. The stock has demonstrated volatility, trading between $3.50 and $5.50 over the past year. Forecast models acknowledge execution risks and the company's high beta profile relative to broader market.
